name: Gai Tom Kha (Thai Chicken and Coconut Milk Soup)
recipeIngredient: 4 Stalks Fresh lemon grass, bruised and cut into 2-inch lengths
6 Fresh Serrano chiles, sliced into rounds
5 Fresh Kaffir lime leaves (makrut), if available
recipeInstructions:
Cut the chicken breast into 1/2-inch pieces (with or without bones; see note).
Combine coconut milk, chicken stock, galangal, lemon grass, and 4 of the chiles in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes. Strain the stock, discarding the galangal and lemon grass.
Return the strained stock to a boil, then add the chicken and simmer until tender, about 2 minutes.
Add fish sauce, citrus leaves, and the remaining chiles. Stir in lime juice.
Garnish with coriander. Serve 6 to 8 portions.
